description.en: Iconic surf beach with consistent waves for beginners and intermediates. Black sand, temple on the rocks, and the best sunset views in Canggu. The surf community gathers here daily.
description.id: Pantai selancar ikonik dengan ombak konsisten untuk pemula dan menengah. Pasir hitam, pura di atas batu, dan pemandangan matahari terbenam terbaik di Canggu.

address.en: Jl. Pantai Batu Bolong, Canggu, North Kuta, Badung, Bali
address.id: Jl. Pantai Batu Bolong, Canggu, Kuta Utara, Badung, Bali

tips: Best waves early morning before 8am
Rent a board from local shops for 50k IDR/hr
Walk to the temple at the point for photos

description.en: A hidden gem just north of Canggu with powerful left-hand point breaks and far fewer crowds. Surrounded by rice fields and traditional villages, offering a more authentic Balinese surf experience.
description.id: Permata tersembunyi di utara Canggu dengan ombak kiri yang kuat dan jauh lebih sedikit keramaian. Dikelilingi sawah dan desa tradisional.

address.en: Jl. Pantai Pererenan, Pererenan, North Kuta, Badung, Bali
address.id: Jl. Pantai Pererenan, Pererenan, Kuta Utara, Badung, Bali

tips: Advanced surfers only - powerful reef break
Much less crowded than Echo Beach
Watch sunset from the cliff viewpoint

description.en: One of Canggu's best-kept secrets tucked between Batu Bolong and Berawa. A local fishing beach with mellow waves, almost no tourists, and authentic village atmosphere.
description.id: Salah satu rahasia terbaik Canggu tersembunyi antara Batu Bolong dan Berawa. Pantai nelayan lokal dengan ombak tenang dan hampir tanpa turis.

address.en: Pantai Nelayan, Canggu, North Kuta, Badung, Bali
address.id: Pantai Nelayan, Canggu, Kuta Utara, Badung, Bali

tips: Great for intermediate surfers
Watch local fishermen at dawn
Very few tourists know about this beach

description.en: Quiet, secluded black sand beach north of Canggu surrounded by rice fields and traditional Balinese villages. Perfect for those seeking solitude and an authentic coastal experience away from the crowds.
description.id: Pantai pasir hitam yang tenang dan terpencil di utara Canggu, dikelilingi sawah dan desa Bali tradisional.

address.en: Pantai Seseh, Munggu, Mengwi, Badung, Bali
address.id: Pantai Seseh, Munggu, Mengwi, Badung, Bali

tips: Bring your own drinks - no vendors
Great for horseback riding tours
Temple ceremonies often held here

description.en: Rustic bohemian beach club built entirely from recycled wood and reclaimed fishing boats. Stunning sunset views, creative cocktails, and a laid-back atmosphere that captures the soul of Canggu.
description.id: Klub pantai bohemian rustik yang dibangun seluruhnya dari kayu daur ulang dan perahu nelayan bekas. Pemandangan matahari terbenam yang menakjubkan.

address.en: Jl. Pantai Echo Beach No.1, Canggu, North Kuta, Badung, Bali
address.id: Jl. Pantai Echo Beach No.1, Canggu, Kuta Utara, Badung, Bali

tips: Arrive by 4pm for sunset seats
No minimum spend for bar area
Try the coconut-based cocktails

description.en: A tropical and cozy hidden gem near peaceful Pererenan, surrounded by rice fields with a plunge pool and scenic views. Free entry and a fraction of the crowds of bigger clubs.
description.id: Klub pantai tropis dan nyaman tersembunyi dekat Pererenan yang damai, dikelilingi sawah dengan kolam rendam dan pemandangan indah. Masuk gratis.

address.en: Jl. Pantai Pererenan, Pererenan, North Kuta, Badung, Bali
address.id: Jl. Pantai Pererenan, Pererenan, Kuta Utara, Badung, Bali

tips: Free entry - one of the only free beach clubs
Rice field views from the pool
Much quieter than FINNS or Atlas

description.en: Part cocktail bar, part underground club with prohibition-era speakeasy interiors. One of the coolest nightlife spots in Canggu for craft cocktails and late-night dancing.
description.id: Separuh bar koktail, separuh klub bawah tanah dengan interior speakeasy era larangan. Salah satu tempat kehidupan malam terkeren di Canggu.

address.en: Jl. Pantai Berawa No.99, Tibubeneng, North Kuta, Badung, Bali
address.id: Jl. Pantai Berawa No.99, Tibubeneng, Kuta Utara, Badung, Bali

tips: Look for the unmarked entrance
Craft cocktails are excellent
Gets busy after midnight on weekends

description.en: Legendary Canggu breakfast institution known for healthy bowls, excellent coffee, and a laid-back surfer crowd. The original location that helped put Canggu on the digital nomad map.
description.id: Institusi sarapan legendaris Canggu yang terkenal dengan mangkuk sehat, kopi lezat, dan kerumunan peselancar santai.

address.en: Jl. Canggu Padang Linjong No.46, Canggu, North Kuta, Badung, Bali
address.id: Jl. Canggu Padang Linjong No.46, Canggu, Kuta Utara, Badung, Bali

tips: Go early to avoid the queue
Smoothie bowls are the signature
Good wifi for working

description.en: Intimate specialty coffee shop hidden away from the main strips. Locally sourced single-origin Indonesian beans roasted in-house. A true coffee connoisseur's spot.
description.id: Kedai kopi spesialti intim tersembunyi dari jalan utama. Biji kopi Indonesia single-origin yang di-roasting sendiri.

address.en: Jl. Pantai Berawa No.36, Tibubeneng, North Kuta, Badung, Bali
address.id: Jl. Pantai Berawa No.36, Tibubeneng, Kuta Utara, Badung, Bali

tips: Ask about their single-origin Flores and Toraja beans
Small space - come early for a seat
Best V60 pour-over in Canggu

description.en: Beloved vegan and vegetarian cafe nestled among rice paddies. Known for creative plant-based dishes, smoothie bowls, and a magical garden setting that feels like a secret hideaway.
description.id: Kafe vegan dan vegetarian kesayangan yang terletak di antara sawah. Terkenal dengan hidangan nabati kreatif dan suasana taman ajaib.

address.en: Jl. Tanah Barak No.53, Canggu, North Kuta, Badung, Bali
address.id: Jl. Tanah Barak No.53, Canggu, Kuta Utara, Badung, Bali

tips: Try the nasi goreng bowl
Sit in the garden section among the rice paddies
Popular with the yoga crowd

description.en: Authentic Indonesian warung serving traditional Balinese and Javanese dishes at local prices. Where the Balinese locals actually eat - no frills, just incredible nasi campur and sate.
description.id: Warung Indonesia otentik yang menyajikan masakan Bali dan Jawa tradisional dengan harga lokal. Tempat makan orang Bali lokal.

address.en: Jl. Pantai Batu Bolong, Canggu, North Kuta, Badung, Bali
address.id: Jl. Pantai Batu Bolong, Canggu, Kuta Utara, Badung, Bali

tips: Nasi campur for 25k IDR is unbeatable
Point and choose style ordering
Cash only

description.en: TikTok-viral local favorite for post-surf refueling. Known for massive portions of comfort food, excellent smoothie bowls, and a young creative crowd.
description.id: Favorit lokal viral TikTok untuk mengisi energi setelah berselancar. Terkenal dengan porsi besar makanan comfort food.

address.en: Jl. Pantai Berawa No.88, Tibubeneng, North Kuta, Badung, Bali
address.id: Jl. Pantai Berawa No.88, Tibubeneng, Kuta Utara, Badung, Bali

tips: Went viral on TikTok - expect a wait on weekends
Great for post-surf fuel
Try their signature smoothie bowls

description.en: Palm Springs-inspired pastel pink cafe with daybeds and a pool overlooking lush green rice paddies. A peaceful hidden gem that most tourists haven't discovered yet.
description.id: Kafe terinspirasi Palm Springs berwarna pink pastel dengan daybed dan kolam renang menghadap sawah hijau subur. Permata tersembunyi yang damai.

address.en: Jl. Pantai Pererenan, Pererenan, North Kuta, Badung, Bali
address.id: Jl. Pantai Pererenan, Pererenan, Kuta Utara, Badung, Bali

tips: Pastel pink decor contrasts beautifully with green paddies
Pool access with food/drink order
Still relatively undiscovered

description.en: Powerful reef break known for fast, hollow waves ideal for intermediate to advanced surfers. The famous Left section offers barrel opportunities. Watch from the cliffside warungs if you're not surfing.
description.id: Ombak reef yang kuat terkenal dengan gelombang cepat dan berlubang ideal untuk peselancar menengah hingga mahir. Bagian Kiri yang terkenal menawarkan peluang barrel.

address.en: Echo Beach, Canggu, North Kuta, Badung, Bali
address.id: Echo Beach, Canggu, Kuta Utara, Badung, Bali

tips: Not for beginners - shallow reef
Best during dry season May-September
Grab a Bintang at the cliff warungs and watch the surfers

description.en: The original Canggu co-working space that launched the digital nomad revolution. Bamboo open-air design, pool, fast wifi, and a vibrant community of remote workers from around the world.
description.id: Ruang co-working asli Canggu yang meluncurkan revolusi digital nomad. Desain bambu terbuka, kolam renang, wifi cepat, dan komunitas pekerja jarak jauh.

address.en: Jl. Batu Mejan, Canggu, North Kuta, Badung, Bali
address.id: Jl. Batu Mejan, Canggu, Kuta Utara, Badung, Bali

tips: Day pass available for drop-ins
Pool access included
Weekly events and networking sessions

description.en: A locals-only sunset viewpoint on the cliffs above Pererenan Beach. No signs, no vendors - just dramatic cliff views over the Indian Ocean and some of the most spectacular sunsets in all of Bali.
description.id: Titik matahari terbenam khusus lokal di tebing di atas Pantai Pererenan. Tanpa tanda, tanpa pedagang - hanya pemandangan tebing dramatis di atas Samudra Hindia.

address.en: Pererenan Cliff, Pererenan, North Kuta, Badung, Bali
address.id: Tebing Pererenan, Pererenan, Kuta Utara, Badung, Bali

tips: Ask locals for directions - no signs
Bring a drink from a nearby warung
One of the few spots in Canggu without crowds at sunset

description.en: Famous for its stunning infinity pool that seamlessly blends with the ocean horizon. One of the more peaceful beach clubs in Canggu, perfect for relaxed sunset lounging without the party crowd.
description.id: Terkenal dengan kolam renang infinity yang menakjubkan yang menyatu sempurna dengan cakrawala laut. Salah satu klub pantai yang lebih damai di Canggu.

address.en: Jl. Pantai Batu Mejan, Canggu, North Kuta, Badung, Bali
address.id: Jl. Pantai Batu Mejan, Canggu, Kuta Utara, Badung, Bali

tips: Book a daybed in advance for weekends
Infinity pool is the main draw
Quieter vibe than FINNS or Atlas
